title: Чаты: Получение метадаты
query: SELECT metadata::TEXT FROM chats WHERE chat_id = $1;

title: Чаты: Получить все чаты, сообщения с лимитом и фильтром по активности
query:
WITH profile_chats AS (
    SELECT
        c.chat_id,
        c.service,
        c.created_at,
        c.chat_name,
        c.active,
        c.metadata,
        cm.member_id,
        cm.member_type_id
    FROM chats c
             JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.chat_id = c.chat_id
    WHERE cm.member_id = $1
      AND c.service = $2
      AND (c.active = $3 OR $3 IS NULL)
),
-- Получаем последнее сообщение для каждого чата напрямую из messages
     last_message_info AS (
         SELECT DISTINCT ON (m.chat_id)
             m.chat_id,
             m.content,
             m.sent_at
         FROM profile_chats pc
                  JOIN messages m ON m.chat_id = pc.chat_id
         WHERE m.is_deleted = FALSE
         ORDER BY m.chat_id, m.sent_at DESC
     ),
-- Применяем сортировку и LIMIT только к чатам с последними сообщениями
     paginated_chats AS (
         SELECT
             pc.chat_id,
             pc.service,
             pc.created_at,
             pc.chat_name,
             pc.active,
             pc.metadata,
             pc.member_id,
             pc.member_type_id,
             COALESCE(lmi.content, '') AS last_message,
             lmi.sent_at
         FROM profile_chats pc
                  LEFT JOIN last_message_info lmi ON lmi.chat_id = pc.chat_id
         ORDER BY lmi.sent_at DESC NULLS LAST
         LIMIT $4
     ),
-- Теперь считаем непрочитанные только для отфильтрованных чатов
     unread_counts AS (
         SELECT gpmb.chat_id, COUNT(gpmb.message_id) AS unread_count
         FROM paginated_chats pgc
                  LEFT JOIN get_paginated_messages_backward(pgc.chat_id, NULL, 10) gpmb ON gpmb.chat_id = pgc.chat_id
         WHERE pgc.active = TRUE
           AND gpmb.is_read = FALSE
           AND gpmb.sender_id <> $1
         GROUP BY gpmb.chat_id
     )
SELECT
    pgc.chat_id,
    pgc.service,
    pgc.created_at,
    pgc.chat_name,
    pgc.active,
    pgc.metadata::TEXT,
    pgc.member_id,
    pgc.member_type_id,
    pgc.last_message,
    COALESCE(uc.unread_count, 0) AS unread_count
FROM paginated_chats pgc
         LEFT JOIN unread_counts uc ON uc.chat_id = pgc.chat_id
ORDER BY pgc.sent_at DESC NULLS LAST;

title: Чаты: Количество чатов по сервису
query:
SELECT
    COUNT(*) as chats_count
FROM chats c
LEFT JOIN chat_members cm ON c.chat_id = cm.chat_id
WHERE TRUE
    AND cm.member_id = $1
    AND c.service = $2;

query:
-- chat_name, service, metadata(json)
INSERT INTO public.chats
(chat_name, service, created_at,active,metadata)
VALUES($1,$2,now(),true,$3) returning chat_id;

title: Чаты: чаты по сервису (backward)
query:
-- service
-- current page first chat_id
SELECT * FROM chats c
WHERE c.chat_id < $2 AND c.service = $1
limit 50;

title: Чаты: получить все чаты пользователя по сервису
query:
-- profile
-- service
-- limit (if '' -> all)
SELECT c.* FROM chats c
JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.chat_id = c.chat_id
WHERE cm.member_id = $1 AND c.service = $2
LIMIT NULLIF($3, '')::INTEGER;

title: Чаты: Получить все сообщения по чату
Чаты: информация по чату + сообщения
query:
SELECT c.chat_id,
 c.service,
 c.created_at,
 c.chat_name,
 c.active,
 c.metadata::TEXT,
 (COALESCE(JSONB_AGG(JSONB_BUILD_OBJECT('member_id', cm.member_id, 'member_type_name', cmt.name)) FILTER (
WHERE cm.member_id IS NOT NULL), '[]'::JSONB))::TEXT AS members,

(SELECT COALESCE(JSONB_AGG(row_to_json(messages.*)), '[]'::JSONB)::TEXT
 FROM get_paginated_messages_backward_sort(c.chat_id, NULLIF($2,'')::INTEGER, CASE
WHEN '' = $3 THEN 100000
ELSE $3::INTEGER
END) AS messages) AS messages
FROM chats c
LEFT JOIN chat_members cm ON c.chat_id = cm.chat_id
LEFT JOIN chat_member_types cmt ON cm.member_type_id = cmt.member_type_id
WHERE c.chat_id = $1
GROUP BY c.chat_id,
 c.service,
 c.created_at,
 c.chat_name,
 c.active,
 c.metadata;

title: Чаты: Получение флага о наличии новых тикетов - OK
Чаты: Получение участника тикета
query:
SELECT
cm.member_id
FROM chats c
LEFT JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.chat_id = c.chat_id
WHERE c.service = 'support' AND c.chat_id = $1 AND cm.member_type_id = $2;

title: Чаты: Получение количества тикетов по uid автора
query:
SELECT COUNT(c.chat_id)
FROM chats c
LEFT JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.chat_id = c.chat_id
WHERE c.service = 'support' AND c.active = TRUE AND cm.member_id = $1 AND cm.member_type_id = 2;

title: Чаты: Получение количества непрочитанных сообщений - OK
query:
-- $1 - тип пользователя member_type_id
-- $2 - uid профиля пользователя
WITH my_active_chats AS (
SELECT c.chat_id
 FROM chats c
 RIGHT JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.chat_id = c.chat_id
 WHERE c.active = TRUE
 AND cm.member_id = $2 
),
unread_counts AS (
SELECT gpmb.chat_id, COUNT(gpmb.message_id) AS unread_count
FROM my_active_chats mac
LEFT JOIN get_paginated_messages_backward(mac.chat_id, NULL, 10) gpmb ON gpmb.chat_id = mac.chat_id
LEFT JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.chat_id = mac.chat_id AND cm.member_id = gpmb.sender_id
WHERE gpmb.is_read = FALSE AND cm.member_type_id <> $1 AND gpmb.sender_id <> $2
GROUP BY gpmb.chat_id
 )
SELECT mac.chat_id,
 COALESCE(uc.unread_count, 0) AS unread_count
FROM my_active_chats mac
LEFT JOIN unread_counts uc ON mac.chat_id = uc.chat_id;

ORDER BY message_id;

title: Чаты: получение чатов по фильтрам - OK
query:
-- EXPLAIN ANALYZE
WITH filtered_chats AS (
    SELECT
        c.chat_id,
        c.chat_name,
        c.active,
        c.created_at,
        c.metadata ->> 'description' AS description,
    c.metadata ->> 'problem' AS service_meta,
    c.metadata ->> 'status_uid' AS status_meta,
    c.metadata ->> 'tag_uid' AS tag_uid,
    c.metadata ->> 'reassigned' AS reassigned,
    c.service,
    cm_auth.member_id AS author,
    cm_exec.member_id AS executor,
    coalesce(c.metadata->>'prev_executor', '') AS prev_executor
FROM chats c
    LEFT JOIN chat_members cm_auth ON c.chat_id = cm_auth.chat_id AND cm_auth.member_type_id = 2
    LEFT JOIN chat_members cm_exec ON c.chat_id = cm_exec.chat_id AND cm_exec.member_type_id = 1
WHERE TRUE
  AND ($1 = '' OR c.metadata ->> 'problem' = ANY(STRING_TO_ARRAY($1, ',')))
  AND ($2 = '' OR c.metadata ->> 'tag_uid' = ANY(STRING_TO_ARRAY($2, ',')))
  AND (
    $3 = '' OR
    ($3 = 'true' AND c.active = TRUE) OR
    ($3 = 'false' AND c.active = FALSE)
    )
  AND ($4 = '' OR c.metadata ->> 'status_uid' = ANY(STRING_TO_ARRAY($4, ',')))
  AND (
    $5 = '' OR
    LOWER(c.metadata ->> 'description') LIKE LOWER('%' || $5 || '%') OR
    LOWER(c.chat_name) LIKE LOWER('%' || $5 || '%')
    )
  AND (
    $6 = '' OR cm_auth.member_id = ANY(STRING_TO_ARRAY($6, ','))
    )
  AND (
    $7 = '' OR cm_exec.member_id = ANY(STRING_TO_ARRAY($7, ','))
    )
  AND (
    NULLIF($8, '') IS NULL OR c.created_at >= TO_TIMESTAMP(NULLIF($8, '')::bigint)
    )
  AND (
    NULLIF($9, '') IS NULL OR c.created_at <= TO_TIMESTAMP(NULLIF($9, '')::bigint)
    )

GROUP BY
    c.chat_id, c.chat_name, c.active, c.created_at, c.metadata, c.service,
    cm_auth.member_id, cm_exec.member_id
ORDER BY c.chat_id DESC
    LIMIT 20
OFFSET (($10 - 1) * 20)
    ),
    unread_counts AS (
SELECT
    fc.chat_id,
    COUNT(m.message_id) AS unread_count
FROM filtered_chats fc
    INNER JOIN messages m ON m.chat_id = fc.chat_id
    INNER JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.chat_id = m.chat_id AND cm.member_id = m.sender_id
WHERE m.is_read = FALSE
  AND fc.active = TRUE
  AND cm.member_type_id <> 1
  AND m.sender_id <> $11
GROUP BY fc.chat_id
    )
SELECT
    fc.chat_id,
    fc.chat_name,
    fc.service_meta AS service,
    fc.description,
    fc.status_meta AS status,
    fc.reassigned,
    fc.tag_uid AS tag,
    fc.author,
    fc.executor,
    fc.prev_executor,
    fc.created_at AS creation_date,
    COALESCE(uc.unread_count, 0) AS unread_count
FROM filtered_chats fc
         LEFT JOIN unread_counts uc ON uc.chat_id = fc.chat_id;

title: Чаты: Добавить участника в чат
Чаты: получить участников
Чаты: задать значение полю в metadata
query:
-- chat_id, field_name, field_value
-- Черная магия
UPDATE chats
SET metadata = JSONB_SET(metadata, ARRAY[$2]::text[], TO_JSONB($3::TEXT))
WHERE chat_id = $1;

title: Чаты: Сменить member_id с deviceId на uid профиля студента
query:
UPDATE chat_members SET member_id = $1
WHERE member_id = $2;

title: Чаты: Сменить sender_id с deviceId на uid профиля студента
query:
UPDATE messages SET sender_id = $1
WHERE sender_id = $2;

title: Чаты: Получить все чаты, сообщения, количество непрочитанных
query:
-- sender_id, service
WITH profile_chats AS (
SELECT c.chat_id
FROM chats c
JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.chat_id = c.chat_id
WHERE cm.member_id = $1 AND c.service = $2
)
SELECT
c.chat_id,
c.service,
c.created_at,
c.chat_name,
c.active,
c.metadata::TEXT,
(COALESCE(JSONB_AGG(JSONB_BUILD_OBJECT(
'member_id', cm.member_id,
'member_type_name', cmt.name
)) FILTER (WHERE cm.member_id IS NOT NULL), '[]'::JSONB))::TEXT AS members,
(SELECT
 COALESCE(JSONB_AGG(row_to_json(messages.*)), '[]'::JSONB)::TEXT
 FROM
 get_paginated_messages_backward(
 c.chat_id,
 NULL,
 10
 ) AS messages
) AS messages
FROM chats c
LEFT JOIN chat_members cm ON c.chat_id = cm.chat_id
LEFT JOIN chat_member_types cmt ON cm.member_type_id = cmt.member_type_id
WHERE
c.chat_id IN (SELECT chat_id FROM profile_chats)
GROUP BY
c.chat_id,
c.service,
c.created_at,
c.chat_name,
c.active,
c.metadata
ORDER BY c.chat_id;

title: Перевести обращение в работу
query: SELECT assign_ticket_executor($1, $2, $3);

title: Чаты: Получение информации об обращении
query:
SELECT
c.chat_id AS chat_id,
c.chat_name AS chat_name,
c.active AS active,
c.created_at AS datecreate,
c.metadata->>'tag_uid' AS tag,
c.metadata->>'status_uid' AS status,
c.metadata->>'problem' AS service,
c.metadata->>'description' AS description,
c.metadata->>'path' AS path,
coalesce(c.metadata->>'reassigned', 'false') AS reassigned,
coalesce(c.metadata->>'prev_executor', '') AS prev_executor,
c.metadata::TEXT AS metadata,
JSONB_AGG(JSONB_BUILD_OBJECT('member_id', cm.member_id, 'member_type_id', cm.member_type_id))::text AS members
FROM chats c
LEFT JOIN chat_members cm ON cm.chat_id = c.chat_id
WHERE c.chat_id = $1
GROUP BY c.chat_id

title: Чаты: изменение статуса обращения - OK
query:
--chat_id, active, status_uid
UPDATE public.chats
SET 
metadata = jsonb_set(metadata, '{status_uid}', to_jsonb($3::text)),
active = $2
WHERE chat_id = $1;

title: Чаты: Изменение статуса с возможностью занулить исполнителя
query:
-- $1 - IN p_chat_id bigint
-- $2 - IN p_active boolean
-- $3 - IN p_status_uid text
-- $4 - IN p_reset_executor boolean
CALL change_status_reset_executor($1, $2, $3, $4);

title: Чаты: запись жалобы в метадату
query: UPDATE chats SET metadata = metadata || jsonb_build_object( 'has_complaint', true, 'complaint_count', COALESCE((metadata->>'complaint_count')::int, 0) + 1, 'last_complaint_at', now()::text, 'last_complaint_reason', $3, 'complaint_message', $4 ) WHERE chat_id = $1;

title: Админ: Получение списка чатов с фильтрами
query:
WITH filtered_chats AS (
    SELECT
        c.chat_id,
        c.service,
        c.chat_name,
        c.active,
        c.created_at,
        c.metadata,
        COALESCE((c.metadata->>'has_complaint')::boolean, false) as has_complaint,
        COALESCE((c.metadata->>'complaint_count')::int, 0) as complaint_count,
        c.metadata->>'last_complaint_reason' as complaint_reason,
        c.metadata->>'uid_buyer' as uid_buyer,
        c.metadata->>'uid_seller' as uid_seller
    FROM chats c
    WHERE TRUE
      AND ($1 = '' OR c.service = $1)
      AND ($2 = '' OR (c.metadata->>'has_complaint')::boolean = ($2)::boolean)
      AND ($3 = '' OR LOWER(c.chat_name) LIKE LOWER('%' || $3 || '%') OR LOWER(c.metadata::text) LIKE LOWER('%' || $3 || '%'))
),
last_msg AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (m.chat_id)
        m.chat_id,
        m.sent_at
    FROM messages m
    JOIN filtered_chats fc ON m.chat_id = fc.chat_id
    WHERE m.is_deleted = FALSE
    ORDER BY m.chat_id, m.sent_at DESC
),
paginated AS (
    SELECT
        fc.*,
        lm.sent_at as last_message_sent_at
    FROM filtered_chats fc
    LEFT JOIN last_msg lm ON lm.chat_id = fc.chat_id
    ORDER BY 
        fc.has_complaint DESC,
        lm.sent_at DESC NULLS LAST,
        fc.created_at DESC
    LIMIT $4
    OFFSET $5
)
SELECT
    p.chat_id,
    p.service,
    p.chat_name,
    p.active,
    p.created_at,
    p.last_message_sent_at,
    p.has_complaint,
    p.complaint_count,
    p.complaint_reason,
    p.uid_buyer,
    p.uid_seller,
    p.metadata::TEXT as raw_metadata
FROM paginated p;
